item.title: Version 1.0.21
item.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v1.0.21 -->
## What's Changed ### Other Changes * Make built-in display restore more conservative by @rkrkrkk in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/145 * macOS 27: revive menu-bar right-click + fix beta breakages (macOS ≤26 byte-identical) by @Goldenmonstew in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/142
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/compare/v1.0.20...v1.0.21
